message:
fix(tmux): use atomic counter for buffer names to prevent concurrent collisions

time.Now().UnixNano() alone can return identical values when multiple
goroutines call SendBufferWithDelay within the same nanosecond during
staggered agent spawning. This causes tmux buffer name collisions where
one goroutine's content silently overwrites another's buffer, resulting
in wrong content being pasted into the wrong pane.

Add an atomic.Uint64 counter (bufferSeq) that's combined with the
timestamp to guarantee uniqueness across concurrent goroutines.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
